titleStmt.title: SII 22.575: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 575. (A.R. No. 575 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, YĀṬAVĀKILI Chandramauḷīśvara temple-On the base of the temple Parak. Rājēndrachōḷa I—22nd year (A.D. 1036)

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumaṉṉivaḷara, etc. It records a gift of 500 kuḻi of land to the east of Kūttāḍi-ēri (tank) by a Veḷḷāḷa named Kāri Maṇikkāḍa-Gāmuṇḍan for the avirbali and archana worship in the temple of Iruṅgīśvaram-uḍaiya-Mahādēva which he had constructed in his village Ēṭṭavāykkāl in Puli-nāḍu, a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. The tank also is stated to have been the work of this donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyuṅ cirttaṉic celviyuṟ taṉ peruntEviyarākki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvana velippaṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻ matiṭkoḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattarai yarta muṭiyu māṅkavaṉ ṟeviya roṅkoḻil muṭiya muṉṉavaṉ pakkaṟ ṟeṉṉavan vaitta cuntaramuṭiyumintiraṉāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimayiṟ cūṭuṅkulata

ḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tol peruṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=tivuñ ceruviṟciṉavi lirupattoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉai melvaruñcānti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyu mintiraṉāra mu
ḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkanaḷap perum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyal laṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkup perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarako
ṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturai maṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷava nāmaṇaik koṇayum veñciṉavirap

pañcappaḷḷiyum māciṭaip paḻan mācuṇi tecamu mayarvil vaṇkirkti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉ tol kulattinti rarataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulattaṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭar viṣaiyamum pūcurarcer naṟkocalaināṭu n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colai
tākkit tikkaṇakirtti takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovintacantaṉ māviḻin toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa to

ṭṭa mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṇaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭiṅ kaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟi malarttirttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vicaiyottuṅ

ṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavānakaḻakap port toḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum moyttoḻil puṉamaṇippu tavamuṅ kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijaiyamun tuṟainirpanmaiyum vaṉmalai yūravaiyiṟṟoṉ malaiyāramum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkāval viṉai

Ilaṅkā cokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉaṟ māppāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai mevili paṅkamum viṇaippantūṟuṭai vaṇaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talait takkolamuṅtitamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutir kaṭuntiṟalilāmuritecamum(n)teṉakkavār poḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭu kaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭu muraṭkiṭāramu māpperuntaṇṭāṟ ko

jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇapāṭi pulināṭṭu Eṭṭāvāykkāl veḷḷāḷan kāri maṇikkāṭakāmuṇṭanen Eṭuppitta tirukkaṟṟaḷi Irukiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku Avipali Arccanāpokattukku viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūril teṟku tāṉ kaṭṭuvitta kūttāṭi Eriyilk kiḻakkilt tūmpukku kiḻakku
pali Arccanāpokattukku viṭṭen kāri maṇikkāṭakāmuṇṭanen Idhanmam Iṟakkuvāṉ kaṅkai Iṭaikkumari Iṭaippaṭṭa pāvattiṟ povāṉ kavilaiyum vāraṇavāciyumaḻitta pāvattil paṭuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.575 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
